message:
polish(viz): IntakePhasesViz round 1/3 — affordances

- Phase buttons: role="tab" + aria-selected + aria-controls linking to
  drill panel (role="tabpanel"), proper aria-label with phase number/name
- Hover: subtle scale-[1.02] + active:scale-[0.98] press feedback on
  idle buttons, enhanced border/bg opacity on hover
- Focus: accent-aware focus-visible ring (white/80 on active, white/60
  elsewhere), ring-offset matches dark canvas
- Touch: min-h-[3rem] + cursor-pointer for tap affordance
- Tablist: wrapper has role="tablist" + aria-orientation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
